summary: The BuildRequest explicitly states that admin panel and owner verification functionality already exist and should not be modified. However, the diff shows significant modifications to existing admin-related code (useIsOwner hook, useActor hook) and the addition of new infrastructure (URL parameter utilities, migration module) that appear to implement admin access control mechanisms. These changes contradict the explicit constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: Added URL parameter utility module for parsing and managing admin tokens
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states not to modify existing admin functionality. The addition of urlParams.ts with functions like getSecretParameter, getPersistedUrlParameter, and clearParamFromHash suggests implementing new admin token-based access control, which contradicts the constraint that admin functionality already exists.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified useIsOwner hook to call isCallerAdmin instead of original isOwner method
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraint explicitly states 'Do not modify existing useIsOwner hook'. The diff shows the hook was changed from calling 'isOwner' to 'isCallerAdmin', directly violating this constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified useActor hook to initialize access control with admin token from URL parameters
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest states not to modify existing admin functionality. The diff shows new code added to extract 'caffeineAdminToken' from URL and call '_initializeAccessControlWithSecret', implementing new access control initialization logic that wasn't requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Added migration module for backend data migration
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration or data structure changes were requested. The addition of migration.mo with logic to migrate from OldActor to NewActor (removing ownerPrincipal field) suggests backend structural changes that weren't part of the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified backend to include MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest states the backend already has isOwner method and admin functionality. The diff shows integration of new authorization modules (AccessControl, MixinAuthorization) and migration logic, suggesting implementation of new access control infrastructure rather than using existing functionality.
